item.title: MKV QuickPlay 2.4.1
item.description:
MKV QuickPlay 2.4.1

Changed

  • New app icon — a stack of video cards with a play triangle, reflecting what the app is for: flying through a folder, not just playing a file. The icon is generated code (scripts/icongen.swift), with a simplified variant at small sizes for crisp Finder lists.
  • Matching menu bar icon — the status item now shows a miniature of the stack motif as a proper template image (adapts to light/dark and tinting).

Full release on GitHub
